summary: Chose Write capture inbox as the next UI regression surface and scoped a running-app-smoke coverage goal. Compared Write, Home protocols, Train, Patterns, and localization layout against current contract status, existing smoke coverage, and cross-domain blast radius. Write was selected because it is the only Partially implemented capture domain currently shipping, its promotion flows cross Today/Home tasks/Home protocols, and only the Today-Continue ingress to an in-progress Writing note has smoke coverage today. The blocked target slice owlory-ui-regression-expansion-next-surface was flipped to queued, retitled to 'Add Write capture inbox UI regression batch', and given a scoped notes block plus Write-specific allowed_paths.

contract_status_changes.before: owlory-ui-regression-expansion-next-surface was blocked with entry_condition 'A concrete next UI regression surface is selected and scoped.' No surface was named.
contract_status_changes.after: Write capture inbox is the named next surface with a scoped running-app-smoke coverage goal. owlory-ui-regression-expansion-next-surface is queued, retitled, and its allowed_paths cover OwloryUITests/, OwloryUITestSupport.swift, Owlory/Features/Write/, and the relevant doc surfaces.

residual_risks: This triage does not prove the Write regression batch will land at running-app-smoke; the implementation slice still has to satisfy make ui-regression and the failure-classification rules.
This triage does not pick the next surface after Write; that decision belongs to a future triage slice once Write coverage is in place.
Localization layout regression remains gated on the parked first-locale review intake; revisiting that surface requires unblocking app-localization-first-locale-review-intake first.
Voice / live transcription coverage is explicitly deferred because microphone permission is environmental; no slice currently owns that gap.
recommended_next_reason: This is now the highest-priority queued slice. Its scope is fully defined (Write capture inbox, running-app-smoke proof level) and supervisor dry-run already selects it.
